_comment: Drone & RC RF frequency database. Sources: DJI specs, FCC Part 107, OpenDroneID spec, FPV community.

bands.label: RC 433 MHz
bands.description: RC control link — older drones, LoRa telemetry, ELRS 433

bands.label: RC 868 MHz
bands.description: RC control link — EU ISM band, ExpressLRS 868, TBS Crossfire

bands.label: RC 915 MHz
bands.description: RC control link — US ISM band, ExpressLRS 915, TBS Crossfire US

bands.label: DJI / FPV 2.4 GHz
bands._note: OcuSync 2.0 hops the full band — dynamic baseline defeats detection. Use static threshold only.
bands.description: DJI OcuSync 1.0/2.0, DJI Mini 2/3, WiFi RC, FPV video 2.4G, Remote ID

bands.label: DJI O3 / FPV 5.8 GHz
bands.description: DJI OcuSync 2.0/3.0, O3, DJI FPV, Avata, Mini 4 Pro, FPV video 5.8G

bands.label: DJI O3 Low-band 5.1 GHz
bands.description: DJI O3/O4 extended band (Mavic 3, Mini 4 Pro, Avata 2)

bands.label: Analog FPV 1.2 GHz
bands.description: Analog FPV video — long range / fixed wing

bands.label: GPS / GNSS L1
bands.description: GPS L1 (1575.42 MHz), GLONASS L1 — drone navigation. Spoofing here disables GPS.

bands.label: WiFi 2.4 GHz (ch 1-14)
bands.description: Standard WiFi — also used by drone Remote ID (IEEE 802.11) and some RC links

bands.label: WiFi 5 GHz (ch 36-165)
bands.description: Standard WiFi 5 GHz — also used by DJI OcuSync video links
